title: AWS IAM policies should limit the scope of permissions given
description: This rule checks if AWS IAM policies have unnecessary permissions that can lead to security risks.
message: AWS IAM policy has excessive permissions.
impact: Potential unauthorized access or data breach
recommendation: Limit permissions to the least privilege necessary

noncompliant.description: This policy allows all S3 actions on all resources, which is too permissive.

compliant.description: This policy only allows getting objects from a specific S3 bucket, which is less permissive.

why_is_this_an_issue: Excessive permissions can lead to unauthorized access or data breaches.
how_to_fix: Limit permissions to the least privilege necessary.
